review_method: visual inspection of pre/start/last/post frame contact sheet

items.note: Room dialogue ends at the visible cut to the glowing console.
Monitor room is bounded by cuts from and to the mechanical figure.
Profile and close-up sequence is bounded by character-angle changes.
Young man's close-up begins after the canal view and ends at the cityscape.
Scoped rooftop robot sequence ends at the cut to the rifle operator.
Mechanical-eye close-up is bounded by the shooter and woman shots.
Man observing the robotic hand is bounded by the lab and reverse shot.
Two-shot interaction runs from the lab cut to the woman's close-up.
